gist.headline: Daily README Sync
gist.blurb: The daily automated update to our README, keeping the latest news and community apps fresh on the front page.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recent community applications.
gist.impact: Keeps the GitHub repository landing page up-to-date with the latest community activity.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot organizing a bulletin board or painting a fresh sign. A cute robot helper handing her new flyers.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot pinning fresh flyers to a wooden bulletin board. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head hands her new papers. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot pinning fresh flyers to a wooden bulletin board. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head hands her new papers.
